urdu transliteration text: Baba, Mere Baba
english translation text: Baba, O my Baba

urdu transliteration text: Shah Ki Laadli Jab Qaidi-e-Zindaan Hui
english translation text: When the beloved daughter of the king became a prisoner in the prison

urdu transliteration text: Roi Ghabraayi Bahut, Aur Pareshaan Hui
english translation text: She was very afraid, and she cried a lot, and she was very troubled (by the enemies)

urdu transliteration text: Qaid Khaane Ki Ghutan, Mawt Ka Samaan Hui
english translation text: (To the extent that) The suffocation of the prison became her luggage for the journey ahead

urdu transliteration text: Jaan Lagta Tha Ke Ma’ṣūm Ki Be-Jaan Hui
english translation text: It was as if the life of the Ma’ṣūm became lifeless

urdu transliteration text: Laash Shabbir Ki Maqtal Mein Tadap Jaati Thi
english translation text: The body of Shabbir would wince in the Maqtal

urdu transliteration text: Qaid Khaane Se Jo, Bacchi Ki Sadaa Aati Thi
english translation text: When he would hear the painful cries of the little girl from the prison, saying…

urdu transliteration text: Ab Mujhe Koi Sakina Nahin Kehta Baba
english translation text: O Baba, no one calls me Sakina anymore

urdu transliteration text: Qaidi Kehta Hai Koi, Koi Yateema Baba
english translation text: Someone calls me a prisoner, while others call me an orphan.

urdu transliteration text: Neel Rukhsaron Pe Binaayi Bhi Jiski Kam Ho
english translation text: My cheeks have turned blue from the slaps and my vision has become blurred

urdu transliteration text:
Umr Ho Chaar Baras Aur Kamar Mein Kham Ho
Aapne Dekhi Hai Kya Aisi Zaifaa Baba
english translation text: I am four years old, but my back is brokenHave you ever seen an aged girl like me Baba?

urdu transliteration text:
Main Bayaan Kaise Karoon
Apni Museebat Tumse
english translation text: How do I narrate to you my tragedy?

urdu transliteration text: Kya Karoon Apne Tamaacho(n) Ki Shikayat Tumse
english translation text: How do I complain to you about the slaps that I endured?

urdu transliteration text: Sunti Hoon Daadi Ne Khaaya Tha Tamaacha Baba
english translation text: When I’ve heard that my grandmother Fāṭimah al-Zahrā` (sa) was slapped as well!

urdu transliteration text: Khoon-e-Be-Sheer Se Andaaza Kiya Tha Maine
english translation text: Seeing the blood of the one who did not get any milk, I perceived what had happened

urdu transliteration text: Aapka Chehra Toh Pehchaan Liya Tha Maine
english translation text: I had seen the entire tragedy by the look on your face that day

urdu transliteration text: Aap Pehchaano(n)ge Kaise Mera Chehra Baba
english translation text: O Baba, how will you be able to recognize my face now?

urdu transliteration text: Aap The Door Toh Main Saare Sitam Sehti Rahi
english translation text: While you were away, I endured all the afflictions and oppressions upon me

urdu transliteration text: Ro Padi Kufe Ke Darbaar Mein, Main Seh Naa Saki
english translation text: But in the court in Kūfah, I could no longer bare when...

urdu transliteration text: Aapke Saamne Jab Shimr Ne Mara Baba
english translation text: Shimr hit me in front of you, O Baba!

urdu transliteration text: Woh Toh Bimaar Thi, Mar Jaati, Safar Mein Aake
english translation text: She was very sick, she would’ve died if she came on this trip with us

urdu transliteration text: Dafan Karte Use Bazaar Mein, Bhaiyya Kaise?
english translation text: How would my brother have shrouded her in the middle of the market?

urdu transliteration text: Yeh Toh Accha Huwa Aayi Nahin Sughra Baba
english translation text: So it is good that Sughra did not accompany us on this trip, O Baba.

urdu transliteration text: Meri Aankhon se Bahe Jaate The Aansoon Uss Dam
english translation text: The tears would not stop flowing down my eyes in that moment

urdu transliteration text: Haath Bhi Maine Lagaya Nahin, Daadi Ki Qasam
english translation text: But I did not extend my hand, I swear on my grandmother

urdu transliteration text: Dena Chaha Tha Mujhe, Logon Ne Sadaqah Baba
english translation text: When the people tried to even give ME their sadaqa, O Baba!

urdu transliteration text: Uss Ghadi Dhoond Rahi Thi Main, Chacha Jaan Ka Sar
english translation text: In that moment I was searching for the head of my beloved uncle (‘Abbās (as))

urdu transliteration text: Kaise Batlaoon Ke Kya Guzri Teri Beti Par
english translation text: How do I explain to you what your daughter has endured?

urdu transliteration text: Haye Mujhko Zaalim Ne Kanizi Mein Jo Mara Baba
english translation text: When the oppressor hit me in the moment of my servitude

urdu transliteration text: Bayn Yeh Karte Hi Khamosh Hui Woh Akbar
english translation text: O Akbar (the poet), once she narrated all of this to her father she became quiet:

urdu transliteration text: Aaj Toh Jayenge Saath Apne Mujhe Bhi Lekar
english translation text: Today, I know he will take me with him

urdu transliteration text: Aapko Meri Qasam, Kijiye Waada Baba
english translation text: For my sake, promise me you will O Baba!
